elements.name: Description
texts:
Seadavog Mountain is in the Electoral Division of Templecarn, in Civil Parish of Templecarn, in the Barony of Tirhugh, in the County of Donegal

Seadavog Mountain is on Logainm.ie: Seadavog Mountain.

Seadavog Mountain has an area of:

    3,054,893 m² / 305.49 hectares / 3.0549 km²
    1.18 square miles
    754.88 acres / 754 acres, 3 roods, 20 perches

Nationwide, it is the 5161st largest townland that we know about

Within Co. Donegal, it is the 442nd largest townland
